main.description: The canonical self-published profile for an app built on or for the AT Protocol.

name.description: The display name of the app.

description.description: A short description of what the app does.

images.description: Visual assets for directories and stores, such as icons, hero images, screenshots, banners, and social cards.

tags.description: Open discovery tags for filtering and search, preferably lowercase.

status.description: Current release or maintenance status of the app.

links.description: Relevant destinations for the app. The first link should be the primary destination.

webManifestUri.description: URI of a Web App Manifest for richer install and directory metadata, such as icons and screenshots.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this profile was last updated.
